true chocolate brown, roomy, stays up, and comfortable! For reference, these are my true measurements: bust - 38” waist - 31.5” hips 46”, and I’m 5’6 around 185. I hold a good amount of weight in my hips/glutes, and my stomach is on the natueal flatter end, with a natural lower belly protruding. I purchased a Large! PROS: I really like the pants and truly underestimated them! For someone with a hourglass shape/bigger waist to hip ratio, I was looking for wide trousers that had room around my leg but cinched at the waist, and these pants do! It has elastic in the back and a button/zipper in the front, with belt loops all around. With buttoning the pants, the elastic in the back allowed for a secure & tight, yet still comfortable fit around my waist—with and w/o shirt tucking. I am closer to 5’6.5 and a half than 5’6, with my torso & leg being of equal length. I ordered the 31” inseam pants, and wore them with a pair of 1/1.5 inch platform loafers; they are the perfect long length without dragging on the floor. CON: the only issue I had is the loose pouch that I got around my crotch area (see pic). Pretty typical for my body type with any loose-fitting pants, just because of its tailoring for straighter figures. Unless I pose a certain way, it is slightly apparent when walking. But doesnt bother me too much—as long as you wear an appropriate shirt that compliments the bagginess, it won’t pull in as much attention. I will be ordering in different colors!

Comfortable Pants First off I would say that are the most comfortable stretch dress pants I have come across. They have cute little pockets in the front and elastic waistband. This product is true to size. I am 5'3. I weigh 165 lb and I have big hips and got a large but I could have got a medium.

Extremely Comfortable ☺️ I am 5’7, 155 pounds and I ordered a size Large in the color Black. I go back and forth typically in sizes medium and large in pants. Sometimes I am a size 6 but often I am a size 8. The large fits me in the waist extremely well. These pants are made out of 80% Nylon and 20% spandex so they are very stretchy and soft all over. One of the comfiest black dressier pants I now own! The waist is elastic and although it looks like it buttons up in the front, it is only there for visual purposes. These fit me tighter at the waist and hips and then are a straight leg with the slightest gradual flare going all the way down to give a tiny amount of wideness at the bottom. I wouldn’t consider these wide leg pants though. The only thing I wish I could change about these pants is the length. This is a normal problem for me though. The length is perfect if I wear a flat shoe but anything higher they will be too short. I like to wear a chunky block sandal or something with a heel when I wear black pants like this and unfortunately I will not be able to do that. Other than that, these are extremely comfy and I love them!

Comfortable, Flattering and Versatile I seriously want to live in these trousers! I love that I don't have to fuss with any zippers or buttons - the buttons on the front are just decorative. I'm definitely planning on ordering more of these pants in different colors. They're such a great find and so comfy!

Heavy weight denim w/ moderate stretch. I ordered my regular size and shockingly these fit! At first I thought they looked too small to fit me, but they actually fit well and we're not tight due to the moderate stretch in the fabric. The weight of the denim is much thicker and heavier than I like, but the jeans are actually pretty comfortable nonetheless. The length was too long at first, but after one wash in cold water and only partially tumble drying them, they did shrink to a perfect length! The waist still fit perfectly which is often my trouble spot of not being generous enough. The online size guide for my "regular" size even listed the waist measurement as several inches less than what is typical, but I ordered my "regular" size anyway and this pair of jeans fit very comfortably because of the generous stretch. I do not like tight clothing. I would go so far as to say those gals who are more petite or slimmer, should consider sizing down! I have a thick waist (5' 4" & 154 lbs) and my regular size (12) fit me very comfortably. This style is kind of cute for an occasional mix-up/change. If you are on the fence, I'd say give them a try. They seem very well made! Mine were sewn perfectly and no flaws in the denim. They washed, partially tumbled, and hung to finish drying great! I only experienced shrinkage in length.

Comically wide legs.... I usually wear a us 12 in jeans. 5' 4" about 140 pounds. Ordered the size 14 per the chart. Flat Garment measurements not stretched for the size 14: 16.5" waist 22.5" hip 30.5" inseam 44" top of waist to hem 13.5" button at waist to crotch seam 12.5" leg bottom hem flat....so when you double that measurment for the circumference that's at least 25" around at the ankle for each leg...lol 🤣 These pants also are very stretchy. Good stretch Wide leg jeans are back in style! I love the color and stretch of these jeans. The back pockets are placed in a good location. The zipper and button are durable. I accidentally ordered these jeans two sizes smaller than usual. I normally wear a size 14 jeans. I weigh 215 pounds. When I ordered JB jeans, I always order one size down because of the stretch. I was able to get these jeans on and since I’ve lost over 35 pounds this year, I will save these for my next goal weight, when I will fit into size 12 clothes at 195lbs. As you can see by the photos the inseam is extremely long which causes the jean to look bunched up and unproportional on me. They are also very wide leg and woukd look best when worn with some sort of heel. For reference I am 5ft 6in tall and weight 130-135lb and wear a size 4-6 in pants. Unfortunately the fit of these jeans didn't work for me. I would consider the inseam before ordering.

The legs are really wide, it's going to take some getting used to such a different style for me. The denim is a nice heavier weight, but still stretches. The legs are a bit long for me, but I'll probably wear them with boots or chunky heels, so that should be fine. I ordered size 2, and the fit is a bit loose. I'm 4'10" and 92lbs for reference. Overall nice jeans, I like them.

Love them So I read the reviews on these and wasn’t sure what size to get. I don’t have a big mid section but I do have big hips and butt so I normally wear a XL. Based on what other said about the fit I decided to go with the 3xl and they fit perfectly. If you do have a bigger mid section I could see the elastic band rolling down for those people so keep that in mind. Over all they are good quality nice material that holds you in and not see through. They are long I wore them with just a 2 inch heel and they drag about a half inch. So I would suggest if you are 5’5 or shorter wear at least a 3 to 4 inch heel. I bought these for a disco party but I also started roller skating so I will definitely be buying other colors in the future for my new hobby because the length will be perfect.

Finally, black wide leg pants for a 5'2" me! These those black high-waisted wide leg pants are stylish and comfortable. I'm 5'2" and it's usually tought to find pants that don't need hemming, but pants fit me well. They look great with sneakers or flats, but look too short with heels. The waist is great, sitting just right with its stretchy back, zipper, and clasp closure. I just wish they had added a second clasp or a button for that extra secure feel. The fabric is smooth with just the perfect thickness. Not too thin, not too heavy. These pants are really versatile, sliding from a casual sneaker look to something more classy with flats and a belt. I can glam them up with some fancy accessories, and they elevate the look of the pants.

Quality and fit are great! After reading so many great reviews I decided to buy both colors in size S. The size chart was exact. Black was supposed to come 5 days later but surprisingly came early with the Brown pair! I love details so here goes. I'm 5'4" but wearing 3-4" heels in the photos. I weigh 115 lbs. The rise on these pants are high at 11.5". For me that's over the belly. Measuring the waist laying flat from left to right was 13.5". My high waist size is naturally 26", hips 36". The pants fit great though I would prefer a little tighter in the waist just to accentuate the waistline. However, with this fit, it won't be uncomfortable sitting down. These are also on the thinner side which I like with a raw hem. They don't have that typical fleece lining that faux leather pants usually have. I can't speak for durability yet but definitely pleased with the look and feel of these so far.

10,000 Stars! Exactly what I wanted, follow the size chart! Update! These absolutely can be cut!! I cut off about three inches so I can wear them with sneakers or flats but they also look cute with heels. A rotary cutter and ruler made it super easy. I ordered them in the black too and they are SO FANTASTIC! They look just like the $100 Abercrombie ones! So happy! Original review: These pants are SO GOOD!!! I am shocked at how perfect these are! They fit perfectly and are so comfortable. They have SOME stretch to them so they are easy to wear for long periods. They will look better with a heel or even sneakers than a bootie, but I was too lazy to change my shoes and socks! :) Some thoughts below: - Follow the size chart for the best fit. I usually wear a womens 6 or 28" waist which can be a small or medium, based on the size chart, I went with the medium and they are SO perfect! I am 5'7" and 135lbs for reference. - It is a faux leather but it does not have that AWFUL fish smell that some do. The material doesn't look super fake either, it looks great. I was SHOCKED. - The inside almost has a lining to it, they are very comfortable and I imagine will keep you nice and warm - I love that it has belt loops and pockets! Neither are super large, but both appreciated. - No butt pockets but I am literally amazed at how good my butt looks in these! I was NOT expecting that! - The ends of the pant legs are unfinished so I THINK you could cut them if they were too long on you. I cannot say for sure as the length is great for me at 5'7" but it appears that you could (see photos) Overall, I am so in love with these pants, I already went back and ordered them in black. I am not kidding when I say I have ordered 10-15 pairs of faux leather pants to find THIS LOOK and I finally found it with these. I am so happy and I cannot recommend them enough!

I love all the pockets. perfect work-from-home wardrobe piece!

Thick fabric & perfect length for 5'4"! I'm 5'4" and currently 155 lbs., and the Medium size fits me almost perfectly (a tiny bit snug at the waist, but I'm losing weight so that won't be an issue for long). The elastic waist pulls in enough that I probably could also have worn a Large for a more relaxed fit through the seat and leg. The length is ideal for me, hitting just at the heel with a break at the ankle. That means if you're above average height, these pants may be a bit short for you. There's not much hem to let out. I usually have low expectations for knit and/or stretch pants, but this fabric is thicker than most. No panty lines visible, and the fabric has a pretty low stretch ratio -- it has enough give that you can move comfortably, but it's not clingy. The ribbing is visible, but neutral enough that from a few feet away the pants just look like dress slacks unless you're in super bright light (my photos were taken in direct sun to show detail, but in average room lighting they look darker). Obviously this applies to the black pants I'm reviewing; if you select a different color, texture visibility may vary. The pockets are large enough to fit my entire hand, but because they're set at an angle, I'm not sure I'd trust them with a large device like a smartphone. The only thing about these pants that I don't care for is the drawstring, which is 1) enormous and can't be tucked out of sight inside the waistband because it's so bulky, and 2) superfluous, because the waist is so heavily elasticized. I ended up pulling the drawstring out of mine (one end is untied, so it's easy) so the pants look less like sweatpants. I usually wear shirts untucked, so the holes in the waistband aren't likely to show. Overall, I'm pleased with the quality, and will put these into rotation with my fall casualwear!

Super Warm Work Pants Size Large has a 28-36" elastic waist, 42" hips, 28" inseam, and 12" high rise. The elastic is medium-light, not too firm, feels pretty comfy even at 36". They are definitely wide leg and are a bit excessively baggy on me but at least I can move around easily in them. It's not entirely clear what these pants are made of but the outer layer is a lovely nice quality sweater material that seems likely to be a blend of synthetic and natural materials, and the inner layer is a synthetic microfleece. The color '01 Nude' is pretty similar to the listing photo, a bit darker, they just photograph more yellow. The pockets are pretty roomy. They do show pantylines despite the thickness. The pants are a bit heavy but it has belt loops if you need a belt to keep them up. It's too early in the year to test them but they seem plenty warm to me and will probably be okay down to like a good 10F is what I would guess. They look quite sharp and fashionable but feel like cozy sweatpants, I like them. I would recommend to wash on cold and hang dry, no dryer ever.

A very shiny brown The material of these pants is a very shiny “velvet” and not at all what I expected. The material is soft and the pants washed and dried well on a gentle cycle with a low heat setting to dry. I am 5’5” and weigh about 138. I am usually a medium in most pants. These pants are several inches too long and the waist is a bit tight—just not a good fit for me.

Surprised at how nice these are These are not what I would call velvet. It's more of a stretchy weighty velvety material. This fabric will likely hold up to wear better than velvet which is more delicate. The material is surprisingly heavy in a good way, which makes them hang nicely like in a draping kind of manner. The weight also helps to make them appear well made and a good quality. I am 5' 6", usually order a 31 inseam, and the length is to the floor so taller girls it works. I am between a L and XL but usually opt for XL for bottoms as I'm a bit hippy and these have ample room. I'm pretty sure I could do a L and they would just not be as flowing. So I call this ample true to size. I should also mention there are seam pockets and they don't make my hips look bigger. The sides lie flat. I want these over my typical house clothing of leggings because I'm finding the clinginess of leggings bothers me, but I don't want to go all the way to PJ bottoms. These are very nice for the price and I'm especially pleased with the weight. These are so nice you could probably wear them out with a sparkly top such as New Years or Christmas, but for me they will be stylish lounge wear.I'm so happy with them that I'd say it's a favorite item from Amazon. They are that nice. Also may purchase a second and may try a L.

Surprised at how nice these are These are not what I would call velvet. It's more of a stretchy weighty velvety material. This fabric will likely hold up to wear better than velvet which is more delicate. The material is surprisingly heavy in a good way, which makes them hang nicely like in a draping kind of manner. The weight also helps to make them appear well made and a good quality. I am 5' 6", usually order a 31 inseam, and the length is to the floor so taller girls it works. I am between a L and XL but usually opt for XL for bottoms as I'm a bit hippy and these have ample room. I'm pretty sure I could do a L and they would just not be as flowing. So I call this ample true to size. I should also mention there are seam pockets and they don't make my hips look bigger. The sides lie flat. I want these over my typical house clothing of leggings because I'm finding the clinginess of leggings bothers me, but I don't want to go all the way to PJ bottoms. These are very nice for the price and I'm especially pleased with the weight. These are so nice you could probably wear them out with a sparkly top such as New Years or Christmas, but for me they will be stylish lounge wear.I'm so happy with them that I'd say it's a favorite item from Amazon. They are that nice. Also may purchase a second and may try a L.

Everyday comfort Herseas Sweatpants are a, "wear all the time, everywhere, comfortable sweatpants". I'm not usually a huge polyester fan, but these pants are beyond comfortable. Easy to wash and wear, I washed them in a cool regular cycle with a medium heat tumble dry and they came out great. No shrinkage, stretching, or weird static feeling. They are soft, not clingy, and are the right length for my longer leg. I am 5' 8" weighing 195 lbs, I have a hard time finding sweatpants that are long enough in the leg. I got a XXL that fit perfectly. I highly recommend and want more of these!

Perfect 90s style I love these adorable Herseas High Waisted Sweatpants for Women. The contrast stitching is flattering and adds style to these pants, elevating them above 'just another pair of sweats.' They remind me of styles I wore in the 90s. I like this cut of pants to hang low on my waist, so I ordered a Large, measuring where I wanted them to fall on my hips and using that as the waist measurement. I love the baggy fit--I usually wear a US 6 and am 117#. Adjust according to your vibe! Please note—these are the perfect length for me, and I’m just 5'3" tall…so my guess is these are better for people on the shorter side. I definitely do recommend!

Better than expected When I took these sweatpants out of the packaging, the first thing I noticed was their weight. These pants have a substantial feel to them, which is a sign of better quality compared to other sweatpants from Amazon that feel flimsy and are made from cheap material. These sweatpants look exactly as pictured and fit me very well. I am 5’4 and usually wear an inseam of 28-29 inches and these pants just hit my heels without touching the floor. There are no issues with the stitching or cut, unlike other sweatpants that are often cut crooked, fit oddly, or have seams coming apart. While these pants are on the thinner side, the material is not see-through. The inside isn't as soft as some other sweatpants, but it's still comfortable. The only major complaint I have is the design on the front. The item description calls it "elevated seams," which appear subtle and neat in the picture. However, in reality, the seam is crooked and doesn't look good. I don't think ironing would fix this issue, and it would be a hassle to iron sweatpants every time you wear them. I have another pair with this design that looks much better and doesn't have this problem, as shown in my pictures.

Over all the fit is okay; the waist fits securely but you can see from my picture they're a little "hippier" than she needs. I like the pockets, but these are really just a very basic pair of sweats.

Cute button detail, super comfortable! I am in love with these green palazzo style pants! One, the buttons on the side of the pocket are are cute little detail that make it stand apart from the usual dressy/casual pants. It's a nice feature that I've gotten a ton of compliments on. Second, these pants are so comfortable, it feels like I'm going to work in my pajamas. The fabric is thicker than some of the other similar style pants I have which is nice because they are a little warmer and they have a heavy (but not hot) quality fabric feel. I love the elastic waistline because these have quickly become my "I'm having two desserts today" pants. Perfect for a long day of eating! I did size up to a large (5'8", 140lb) so that I'd have plenty of room in them. The pants came vacuum sealed and I washed them and then hung them to dry. I then used a steamer to take out the wrinkles which was quick and easy. These pants are going to become a weekly staple mixed with t shirts or sweaters. I'm thrilled with them!

Ever so slightly tight in the waist and short in the legs, but otherwise, great! I love these pants! They are super cute and very comfortable. My only issue is sizing...I am 5'7" and 135-140lbs and wearing my true size small. They are slightly tight in the elastic waist. Not horrible and I am wondering if maybe they will stretch out with some wear. But because of that, I might say size up if you are between sizes. The length is slightly short for me as well. I wish they had an extra inch on the inseam so they graze the floor when wearing flats. They are about a half inch off the floor barefoot. If you are shorter than 5'7", they will be perfect! Otherwise, the material is NOT see through, I repeat, NOT see through!!! I am thrilled about that!! The material is a silk like blend and very flowy and comfortable. The tie waist is not detachable. There is a pleat at the front which looks nice and dresses these up without adding bulk. Overall, I love these. They are so soft and comfortable and look super chic! They will be perfect for an upcoming trip to Mexico. I MAY take them in to see if the seams can be let out a bit. If you're between sizes, I would go up but if you're taller than 5'7", you may want to skip these because of the length. But definitely recommend otherwise, especially for the price ($24 at time of review).

Flattering, stretchy and OH SO comfortable! I feel like a good review is so much better than pictures. With that being said I’m about 5’4, 195 lbs and I ordered a size large. I carry most of my weight in my mother’s belly. THESE PANTS are everything to me! I love the flared legs because that’s how I used to always wear my jeans. They do touch ground just a bit but also, that’s how my jeans always were and I don’t mind. The biggest most amazing part for me is the FIT! The top of the pants come up enough to hold in my flabby baby belly WITHOUT digging into my love handles! They fit like a glove in my thigh area and flare out enough through the legs for flowy comfort. The pockets are big enough to hold a range of phones and also stretch a little bit still lay flat with nothing in them. Oh and did I mention my butt?? I don’t think it’s ever looked so good. Seriously these pants are SO flattering. And another great feature for me is not only the stretchy material, but the wipe away effect when it comes to Siberian husky dog hair! It literally just wipes off. I’m so in love I can’t wait to buy another pair and I’m about to find out if they come in other colors! 5 star review, these just came in today and I put them on and have been working around the house. No idea how they withstand in the wash yet but I’m completely sold on these!
